content: - [Always refer to Next.js docs](feedback_nextjs_docs.md) — Use context7/explore-docs for any Next.js API before implementing

name: Always refer to Next.js docs
description: User wants Next.js documentation consulted via context7 for any Next.js-related work
type: feedback
originSessionId: 7b403205-2477-4c57-9b14-f8c699a1cf4d
---
Always use the `explore-docs` agent (context7) to look up the Next.js documentation before implementing Next.js features (routing, metadata, middleware, caching, server actions, etc.).

**Why:** User explicitly requested this to ensure implementations follow current Next.js APIs and patterns.
- [No inline CSS — Tailwind only](feedback_tailwind_only.md) — All styling must use Tailwind classes; custom CSS goes in globals.css @layer utilities

name: No inline CSS — Tailwind only
description: User requires all styling via Tailwind CSS classes; no inline style= or style tags
type: feedback
---

Never use inline `style={}` props or `<style>` tags in JSX/TSX. All styling must use Tailwind CSS utility classes.

For effects that Tailwind doesn't cover natively (custom keyframes, -webkit-text-stroke, radial gradients as background-image), add them to `app/globals.css` under `@layer utilities` or as top-level `@keyframes`.
